description_long: This object is a small, ornate, spherical handbag crafted from a metallic material with an antique brass finish. The surface is adorned with intricate filigree patterns, raised floral motifs, and twisted rope-like bands, giving it a highly decorative and vintage appearance. Around the widest part of the sphere, there are several cabochon-like stones in muted tones of white, green, and brown, set into elaborate bezels. A sturdy metal loop is attached at one end, likely serving as a handle or attachment point for a strap. The overall design suggests a blend of historical and artisanal craftsmanship, with a focus on ornamental detail. The handbag appears compact, suitable for carrying small personal items, and would stand out as a statement accessory in an urban setting.
description: A small, spherical, antique brass handbag with ornate filigree, floral motifs, and cabochon stones, featuring a metal loop handle.
description_view_0: The view shows the base of the handbag with the metal loop handle and detailed filigree work, highlighting the intricate floral patterns.
description_view_1: This side view displays the spherical shape, the raised decorative bands, and several colored cabochon stones set into the surface.
description_view_2: The front view focuses on the cluster of cabochon stones and ornate bezels, emphasizing the handbag's decorative face.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the metal loop handle and the arrangement of decorative elements around the sphere.
attribute_strap_type: single short metal loop handle, fixed, not adjustable, attached at one end
attribute_closure_mechanism: likely a hinged or snap closure at the decorated end, integrated into the ornate design
attribute_decorative_elements: raised filigree, floral motifs, twisted rope bands, multiple cabochon stones in bezels
